ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object affected by the action */,
  "object_repr" TEXT /* String representation of the object */,
  "change_message" TEXT /* JSON field containing the change message */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type of the object */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the type of action (add, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, locked, suspended) */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the content type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the content type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type of the object */,
  "object_repr" TEXT /* String representation of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the object was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the object */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the object */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role-permission association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role-permission association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user-role association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object version */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the object */,
  "change_message" TEXT /* JSON field containing the change message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity log entry that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the alert is assigned for resolution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES activity_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the report period */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose activities are being reported */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type included in the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, archived) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
